svg.title: Estimated share of Indian venture funding by sector
svg.desc: Estimated share of Indian venture funding by sector. Source: IVCA and Tracxn sector estimates. Illustrative shares based on reported sector aggregates; definitions vary across sources.

g.text: Estimated share of Indian venture funding by sector

text.style: font: italic 9px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Source: IVCA and Tracxn sector estimates — Illustrative shares based on reported sector aggregates; definitions vary across sources.
